title: Star Rating Widget

statement.markdown:
heading: ## Star Rating Widget
requirements
Create a star rating component where users can select a rating from 1 to 5 stars.
Display the selected rating with the corresponding stars filled with yellow color.
Display the average rating calculated from all the ratings submitted so far.
Display the total number of ratings submitted so far.
The rating input field should be a number input with a step of 1 allowing users to select only whole numbers.
The user's selected rating should be stored in local storage for later retrieval.
The average rating and total number of ratings should be updated in real-time as new ratings are submitted.
The component should be styled using Tailwind CSS classes.

constraints: {"type":"average calculation","value":"sum of all ratings / total number of ratings"}
